description: An Orientalist painting depicting a narrow street in Cairo with a mosque and its white minaret rising prominently in the background. The street is flanked by old buildings with wooden lattice balconies (mashrabiya) and market awnings. Figures in traditional Egyptian dress go about their daily activities — walking, sitting, trading. The sunlight creates warm golden tones on the buildings while shadows fill the narrow street. The painting captures the bustling atmosphere of a historic Cairo neighborhood. No biblical content is present.
